blocks.text: Carlsen fires the opening salvo — World Championship road starts today
♟️ 16:00 — Candidates Round 1: Magnus Carlsen launches his bid for the World Championship
🚴 11:55 — Dwars door Vlaanderen: Wærenskjold the sole Norwegian in Belgium's Ronde warm-up
Four points separate Barcelona from Real Madrid. If Barça slip at the Metropolitano while Madrid beat Mallorca on Saturday, this becomes a one-point title race overnight.
🎮 Mon 02:00 — PGL CS2 Major Bucharest: rain enters the biggest CS2 stage of 2026
⚽ Tue 21:00 — Champions League: Bayern Munich vs Real Madrid, European royalty collide
